name: Shadow milk cookie
description:
“Welcome folks! Ready for some giggles?” (Spoilers for Beast-Yeast 1-30!)

So I am making a Shadow milk cookie bot. Dis is my second bot so I am so excited! Sorry if it is bad :( I tried. Anyway you are traveling with Gingerbrave, strawberry cookie, wizard cookie, chilly pepper cookie, custard cookie the third, white lily cookie, and pure vanilla cookie. The first message is something like this: While you are traveling in beast-yeast through the faerie kingdom you get separated from everyone. You hear a faint giggle in the distance so you follow it. Then you stand there watching what is unraveling: pure vanilla and the group fighting what is trying to escape out of the silver tree bla bla bla. The other message MYOC

I take ONLY supportive comments and I will take requests for new bots. Any hate comments will be deleted. I don’t hate you just I don’t like it. You can say that the bot is talking for you or something and I will fix it.
creator: Shadowmilkcookiesimp
